title: Immune responses in extreme environments.
author_string: Schmitt, D A, Abbal, M, Rykova, M, Meshkov, D O
journal_full: Journal of gravitational physiology : a journal of the International Society for Gravitational Physiology
abstract: In order to identify some of these interactions and regulation between the immune system and other physiological variables we have investigated the immune status in extreme conditions such as long term isolation and confinement, strict antiorthostatic bed rest and spaceflight.
